# ADR-019: YAML-Based Inter-Agent Messaging (v4.3.0)

**Status:** Accepted
**Date:** 2026-03-08

## Context

N/A

## Decision

Adopt YAML as the standard format for all inter-agent message communication in GLITCHLAB v4.3.0 and beyond.

## Consequences

{'positive': ['Enhanced debuggability and auditability', 'Clean extensibility for new agents and message types', 'Compliance with supply-chain audit requirements', 'Standard Pydantic + YAML stack'], 'negative': ['YAML parsing performance overhead (mitigated by caching)', 'Potential schema drift (mitigated by versioning)']}
